title: External Agent Write API — Service Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='service'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='work_record', source slug 'shop'. Tightened in WS-4 from a loose v1.0 prototype to a strict checklist contract: the form-shape Claude reads is the moat. Fields below the root are the canonical structure agents fill from a photo + a sentence.

summary.description: 1–2 sentence headline of the session. Vision- and context-fillable. The single field that must always be present.

narrative.description: Free-form, agent-written description of what happened. No length cap beyond JSONB.

zones_touched.description: Subsystems the agent physically interacted with this session. Closed enum so timeline filtering is reliable. Vision-fillable when a photo shows the area being worked on.

work_performed.description: Discrete actions completed in this session.

work_planned.description: Actions queued for a future session.

parts.description: Parts considered, ordered, installed, or rejected during this session.

decisions.description: Decisions made during the session. Captures intent, not just outcome.

condition_observations.description: Findings about vehicle condition discovered during the session. These are testimony — they appear on the vehicle profile with the agent's attribution and confidence.

system.description: Vehicle subsystem the finding belongs to. Aligned with zones_touched plus engine-internal subdivisions.

shop_ref.description: Free-form shop or workspace identifier (e.g. 'NUKE LTD bay 2', 'home garage').

photos_referenced.description: Caller-side identifiers (URL or sha256) of photos this event references. Stored as testimony pointers; storage and rights handling live outside the envelope.
